recipients.name: Joel Roca
recipients.title: Human Resources Generalist at Lineage
recipients.linkedin_note: Hi Joel, this is Jamie! I recently applied for the HR Generalist role at Lineage and noticed you're an HR Generalist there too. I'd genuinely love to connect and hear about your experience on the HR side at Lineage. Thanks so much!
recipients.email_draft:
Hi Joel,

I hope you're having a good week! Apologies if this is a bit out of the blue — I recently applied for the HR Generalist role at Lineage (Portland site) and came across your profile as an HR Generalist there.

I come from an Organizational Psychology background with about three years across people/HR and program work, including HR-generalist responsibilities, employee relations support, and onboarding at a multinational. I was drawn to Lineage's site-HR model and the chance to partner closely with operations leaders.

I'd genuinely love to hear what the HR Generalist experience is actually like at Lineage. Thanks so much for your time, Joel!

Warmly,
Jamie
